no_pause_stream.text: We need to write deterministic Python radix sort, explain invari

interpretation: Independent requests are not bitwise deterministic on this dynamic expert mapping/kernel path, so the paused-versus-baseline mismatch cannot be attributed to pause alone. Same-stream Level 0 still showed zero chunks while paused and completed without reconnecting.
